name: BLEACH RPG
description:
I will write all character cards entirely in Chinese, and the tuning model used is DEEPSEEK V3.

This is a story in which the user plays as Kurosaki Ichigo.
You will go through the original BLEACH manga/anime storyline, BUT with the freedom to change certain events if you wish.
If you do make any changes, save them to the chat memory and enhance DEEPSEEK’s memory accordingly,
otherwise it may cause inconsistencies or bugs in the story.

Currently, the plot is only arranged up to "Final Getsuga Tenshou."
creator: linn89
